pageContext.name: The Butcher
pageContext.description: Who will survive and what will be left of them?   When you hear the chainsaw revving, you'd better start running! Sideshow Art Prints presents The Butcher: The Texas Chainsaw Massacre Fine Art Print, an original horror art collectible by artist Jason Edmiston.  The classic slasher Leatherface is on the loose in this terrifying pastoral portrait. Artist Jason Edmiston's ideal realism style uses high contrast and saturated colors to create a scene that is less than ideal, depending on where you're standing. The cannibal butcher chases victims off the Sawyer family farm with his signature chainsaw in a recreation of the climactic final moments of The Texas Chainsaw Massacre film. Disguised in the Pretty Woman mask, his stitched visage instills immediate fear as some unfortunate souls are about to meat their maker.  Each The Butcher: The Texas Chainsaw Massacre Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 400 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée or in a custom framed presentation, this horror artwork memorializes an iconic cinematic moment that fans won't want to miss. Pair this print with the articulated Leatherface Deluxe Sixth Scale Figure by Sideshow, sold separately, for a dynamic addition to any display.   See if you can survive the slaughter — bring home The Butcher: The Texas Chainsaw Massacre Fine Art Print by Jason Edmiston today!
